basics.name: VIPUL SINGH
basics.title: Senior Software Engineer
basics.subtitle: Golang | Python | GenAI | RAG | Backend Architecture
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8 years of experience building and scaling high-availability distributed systems and AI-native platforms in production. Strong expertise in backend architecture, Golang microservices, event-driven systems, and domain-driven design.

bullets: Led backend design of scalable SCA/2FA flows for card and payment operations, enabling fraud-driven verification and structured event logging.
Built a Go based Fraud Check microservice with rule-based compliance; reduced fraud incidents by 30% and lowered manual review effort.
Led development of an in-house GenAI RAG system using OpenAI LLMs and Qdrant to automate KYB decisioning from third-party business reports.
Migrated a latency-critical onboarding feature from a PHP monolith to a Golang microservice, isolated via DDD service boundary; improved performance by 65–70%.
experience.stack: Golang, PHP, Python, Postgres, Kafka, VectorDB

bullets: Designed and built enterprise dashboard; realized revenue of 5+ crores in a year and increased orders by 200%.
Automated key products (Smart HR/Tiger Eye) via event-driven Kafka pipelines, scaling job fulfillment by 90%.
Led restructuring of GoLang product service to a clean 3-layered architecture (handler, usecase, dataservice).
Refactored microservices architecture reducing network call overheads by 57%.
Acted as sprint lead, managing delivery timelines and mentoring engineers to uphold quality.
experience.stack: Golang, Python, Django, FastAPI, MongoDB, Kafka

bullets: Designed and deployed 6+ Golang-based monetization microservices using Pub/Sub architecture and service discovery.
Engineered enterprise-grade Google Sheets integration via asynchronous APIs; adopted by 500+ enterprises.
Built high-performance coupon microservice (10,000+ active coupons) with a custom Retool dashboard.
experience.stack: Golang, Python, Django, FastAPI, MongoDB, Kafka

bullets: Scaled notification system to serve millions of daily users via asynchronous processing.
Integrated WhatsApp Business API for conversational commerce flows (Product List, Cart, Order) with Meta & Jio teams.
Contributed to secure and scalable designs as a member of Architecture & Infosec Champions team.
Developed and tested REST APIs using Django, reducing bugs by 16%.
Built reusable API workflow components and integrated external APIs like Jio Connector.
Led integrations with QuickBooks and Zoho to onboard clients with diverse accounting systems.
Designed reliable systems to generate client receivables from Tally, streamlining financial reporting.

certifications: Software Design and Architecture (University of Alberta)
Generative AI with Large Language Models (Coursera)
achievements: Single-handedly built product from 0 to 1 at Apna, onboarding 500+ enterprises.
Jio Haptik Big Hand Award - Highest performing individual.
